zh.Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire,: 蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德登可爾德 凱德拉爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley於大約1342年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾達利時，他的父親Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston23歲，母親Joanna Baird of Galston24歲。他於1366年之前與Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto在蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1404年5月5日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德登可爾德 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley于大约1342年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾達利时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston23岁，母亲Joanna Baird of Galston24岁。他于1366年之前与Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto在苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1404年5月5日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在苏格兰培爾登可爾德登可爾德 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley was born about 1342, in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston, was 23 and his mother, Joanna Baird of Galston, was 24. He married Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto before 1366, in Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 5 May 1404, in his hometown, and was buried in Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley est né environ 1342, à Darnley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joanna Baird of Galston, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto avant 1366, à Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 5 mai 1404, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley um 1342 in Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston 23 und seine Mutter Joanna Baird of Galston 24. Er hat vor 1366 in Lanarkshire, Scotland Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 5. Mai 1404 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley è nato il circa 1342 nel Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Joanna Baird of Galston, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto prima del 1366, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 5 maggio 1404, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnleyが約1342年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアダルンリーで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Stewart of Galstonは23歳，母Joanna Baird of Galstonは24歳であった。1366年以前にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアでLady Marguerite Turnbull of Mintoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1404年5月5日以前に故郷で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアダンケルドダンケルド カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley(이)가 대략 1342년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 더른리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Baird of Galston(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1366년 이전 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1404년 5월 5일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드 던켈드 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley nasceu aproximadamente 1342, em Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Baird of Galston, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto antes 1366, em Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 5 de maio de 1404, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley родился около 1342 г. в местности дарнли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Baird of Galston, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto перед 1366 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 5 май 1404 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности дункелд кэтедраль, дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Stewart 5th Laird of Darnley nació aproximadamente 1342, en Darnley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Stewart of Galston, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joanna Baird of Galston, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Marguerite Turnbull of Minto antes de 1366, en Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 5 de mayo de 1404, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland.
